name: Christina Reynolds, HillaryClinton.com
subject: a message for Donald Trump:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
We can make sure this guy is never president. | Friend --

I have a message for Donald Trump: Enough.

It’s one thing for him to go after Hillary and Bill Clinton -- they can take it. It’s another thing for him to attack huge swaths of the American people and an entire religion, like women (whom he’s called "pigs" and "dogs"), Mexican immigrants (who he thinks are criminals and rapists), and Muslims, at a time when we need them to help fight ISIS and other extremists.

We can't make Donald Trump stop talking. But we can make sure he never, ever becomes president.

**The biggest fundraising deadline of this campaign is in just three days. Chip in $1 right now to make sure Hillary gets the chance to take him on and beat him:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQzNDUzMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyODQ0NDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQzNDUzMTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyODQ0NDQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.

name: Ted
subject: I need you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend, with just hours before the end of 2015, I told my campaign staff to get this email to you immediately. |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559606:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Dear Friend,

With just hours before the end of 2015, I told my campaign staff to get this email to you immediately.

**I need to ask you for a very critical, personal favor** \-- it could come at great personal expense.

And I MUST hear back from you **within the next 48 hours.**

I hope you know me well enough by now to know that I wouldn't ask if it weren't vitally important and that I wouldn't ask you this favor if I wasn't willing to make the same deep sacrifices myself.

Please let me briefly explain because I'm running out of time.

Running for President of the United States has been a HUGE sacrifice.

Only by the grace of God Almighty, the prayers of my friends and family (my dad is a prayer warrior!), and the continued, unending support of people just like you have I been able to forge ahead -- and force the elite media to take notice.

**Friend, it's a war I fight daily and a responsibility I don't take lightly. But, if I'm being honest, I must share something with you...**

The sacrifices for our campaign are steep, but I'm proud and even honored to be making them on your behalf (and on behalf of my family too):

| • | **_There are constant incoming attacks against me and my family:_** as you probably saw just days ago when the liberal media attacked my daughters. It's clear the liberal media, Hillary Clinton, her allies, and even some Republicans have decided the best way to campaign is to tear me down. I face a constant barrage of political and personal attacks daily.

---|---
• | **_I am giving you my best and fighting as hard as I can every day:_** my runoff campaign for the Senate in 2012 took a toll, but now I'm digging deeper and sacrificing even more sleep with long nights and constant travel.

• | **_Family time is not possible:_** some think of this the least, but as a candidate, my days are no longer my own. Days start before dawn and many times don't end until early the next morning. And what makes it worse is when my family is attacked -- I'm sometimes not home to kiss my wife and children and assure them everything is going to be OK.

Friend, let me be clear. I'm not complaining -- **I'm willingly choosing to make these sacrifices.** _AND it will all be worth it when you and I turn this country around._

But now, I'm going to ask you to make your own personal sacrifice for this campaign -- [**click here to make a special one-time, sacrifice donation of $35, $50, or even $500 if you can manage it.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559607:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r)

You see: I wouldn't ask if I wasn't confident. _**I believe we live in a time that, if good people who love freedom and liberty don't stand up and make selfless sacrifices, we will lose the very freedom and liberty we all cherish as Americans.**_

That's why today -- with only hours left before the end of 2015 -- **I'm again asking you to make a sacrifice with me.**

I'm doing all that I possibly can to win this election, and for the next 48 hours, I'm laser focused on meeting my year-end financial goals.

[**Will you join me by making a special, sacrificial gift -- within the next 48 hours -- to help me end 2015 on target?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559607:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r) There are seriously only hours remaining, and I need to hear back from you ASAP!

To make it as quick and easy as possible, I've asked my staff to put together the secure links below so you can make an instant, secure sacrificial gift -- it can be done in five minutes or less, BUT I'm counting on you to do it before the end of the year:

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $35 BEFORE THE END OF 2015 >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559607:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r)**

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $100 BEFORE THE END OF 2015 >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559608:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r)**

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $250 BEFORE THE END OF 2015 >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559609:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r)**

**[I CAN SACRIFICE $1000 BEFORE THE END OF 2015 >>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559610:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r)**

I wouldn't ask you if 1) I wasn't willing to make the same sacrifice myself; and 2) the stakes weren't so high.

Friend, I'm asking you again. Will you help me turn our country around?

Time is critical, and **I hope to hear back from you in the next 48 hours** \-- Heidi and I would be so grateful.

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

P.S. Friend, I've chosen to make the sacrifices in our fight to restore America. [**Will you join me with your gift of $250 or $100?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32559607:s7Iy8ayvN:m:1:1104269936:D02AC084420CE36CDB7DD9BB4FB1FDB5:r) OR if $35 or $10 is a stretch gift for you, Heidi and I will be deeply grateful for each and every dollar you can sacrifice. We promise to ensure it is faithfully used. **Please, I'm counting on hearing back from you in the next 48 hours.**

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Senator Brian Schatz
subject: Trafficking in denials
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Just weeks ago, world leaders announced an historic agreement to take decisive action to reverse the damaging effects of climate change and move the world towards a clean energy future.

This is exactly the kind of bold action the world needs, but the Republican majority in Washington is aggressively blocking this kind of progress, pedaling mistruths and trafficking in denials that leave our economy, our health, our environment, and our national security at risk.

_That 's why it's so critical that we elect Katie McGinty to the U.S. Senate and put the Senate back in Democratic control._

Katie has dedicated her entire career to protecting the environment and facilitating job-creating investments in clean, renewable energy - which is exactly why Republicans would love nothing more than to see her fail.

**[Katie has a major deadline approaching, and she needs your help if she's going to meet her fundraising goal and have the resources she needs to compete. Join me and contribute $5 to her campaign right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1055136545364770816/-7858478984063877120?refcode=e20151229&refcode2=e20151229nd&amount=5)**

Republicans in Washington say climate change is a hoax. They've called the science "hysteria" and refused to acknowledge the grave responsibility human activity bears for this rapidly changing world.

We need a Democratic majority in the Senate if we're going to beat back the obstructionists and continue making progress on these critical issues. Without that majority, there's no telling what kind of damage Republicans will inflict come 2017.

[**Katie 's biggest fundraising deadline of the entire year is just ahead, and there's no time to lose. Contribute whatever you can afford right now to help her build this campaign and take on the climate change deniers in this election. A $5 contribution is all it takes to make a difference >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1055136545364770816/-7858478984063877120?refcode=e20151229&refcode2=e20151229nd&amount=5)

Thanks for stepping up,

Brian Schatz
United States Senator

That 's why it's so critical that we elect Katie McGinty to the U.S. Senate and put the Senate back in Democratic control. Katie has dedicated her entire career to protecting the environment and facilitating job-creating investments in clean, renewable energy - which is exactly why Republicans would love nothing more than to see her fail. Republicans in Washington say climate change is a hoax. They've called the science "hysteria" and refused to acknowledge the grave responsibility human activity bears for this rapidly changing world. We need a Democratic majority in the Senate if we're going to beat back the obstructionists and continue making progress on these critical issues. Without that majority, there's no telling what kind of damage Republicans will inflict come 2017. Thanks for stepping up, Brian Schatz United States Senator | | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: David Plouffe
subject: President Obama's successor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I'm standing with Hillary. | Friend --

When people ask me how the Obama campaign pulled off our surprising upset in the Iowa caucus in 2008, I tell them we had an outstanding candidate and motivated, energized grassroots supporters. But we also had the financial resources to maximize our turnout on caucus night.

Team Hillary has the supporters, but the Sanders campaign is on track to hit a record number of grassroots contributions this fundraising quarter -- he may even outraise us. So this primary is anything but locked up.

The fundraising deadline is midnight on December 31st, and you can help close the gap before then. **[Will you donate $1 to make Hillary’s campaign strong enough to win?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQzNTAyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyOTA5NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The fact is, we have the most supporters in this race by a wide margin. So it's surprising that Bernie Sanders has more people contributing to his campaign than we do.

But when I talk to grassroots activists about Hillary Clinton, they often tell me they don't think she needs their help to win. That she's just about got this thing locked up and they want to wait until later to get involved.

That is a huge mistake.

In politics, nothing is more dangerous than easing up when you think you're in the lead. You have to fight for every last vote, until the very last minute.

We can’t afford for Hillary to lose this nomination. I know she’ll be the fighter we need -- and that she’s committed to protecting and building on President Obama’s progress. But she may not get the chance if you and I don't commit to helping her.

**Chip in $1 before the end of year deadline, and let’s go win this thing:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQzNTAyNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzAyOTA5NjQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

David Plouffe

subject: I'm about to send dad an update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Friend -- I'm about to send dad an update on the 2015 fundraising goal -- and I needed to reach back out.

[**At the moment, I 'll have to tell him we're still $74,426 short and only have 2 days until the deadline. Can you step up and help beat this goal by contributing just $1 before Thursday?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/njfhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbfdfqp_dmdccsjg.html)

Remember, every dollar you contribute will be matched 100% by a group of donors. That's right -- your support will go twice as far in 2016.

Friend, dad doesn't reach out often, but he takes the time when the stakes are this high, so let's not let him down!

**Only 2 days, Friend. Make your matched contribution now:**
[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zdmjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcpsprw_dmdccsjg.html)
Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/umhbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjwnwhm_dmdccsjg.html)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: President George H.W. Bush
Date: December 29, 2015
Subject: Before Thursday**
Friend,

In my lifetime, I have seen our nation at peace and at war, in times of economic growth and in times of economic challenge. My 91 years of experiences in and out of politics lead me to believe this is one of the most consequential elections of my lifetime.

Simply put, America cannot afford another four years like the last eight. Republicans must nominate, and then elect, the candidate who is ready to be the next Commander-in-Chief. Having sat behind the Oval Office desk, I know Jeb is serious about the tough challenges we face. He is the clear choice for our Party, who can and will go on to defeat the Democratic nominee.

But before he can start making our nation safer and stronger, Jeb needs your support ahead of the critical end-of-year deadline on Thursday.

[**Will you stand with him with a gift of $100, $50, $25 or even $5 today? This is our last chance to show the nation that Jeb has what it takes to win next year.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/gnwqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfgrgcm_dmdccsjg.html)

Thursday's deadline isn't like the others. This is his final public deadline before voting begins in states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada. That's why a group of generous supporters are matching every donation that comes in by midnight on Thursday.

[**Friend , the stakes couldn't be higher. Please help Jeb reach his goal by contributing $100, $50, $25 or even $5 before Thursday at midnight.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/unmbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjwnwqy_dmdccsjg.html)

**Please contribute $100, $50, $25 or even $5 before Thursday:[Jeb2016.com/Stand-with-Jeb/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/unpbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjwnwqh_dmdccsjg.html)**

Thank you for your tremendous support this year. It means the world to Barbara and me.

George H.W. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jvmhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpjvjrr_dmdccsjg.html)

subject: The people, not the corporation

body:

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hi, Ben here. Ben Cohen
And Jerry. Jerry Greenfield |
| The people, not the corporation. Ben Cohen
We've known Bernie Sanders for 30 years. And for over 30 years, Bernie has been fighting for workers' rights, veterans, students, and senior citizens. Jerry Greenfield |
| If he weren't so inspiring, he'd be boring. Ben Cohen
As we travel the country campaigning for Bernie, we hear a lot of people saying, "I love Bernie, but I am not sure he can win." Jerry Greenfield |
| But poll after poll shows Bernie is the most electable Democrat. And that's because we all know in our hearts that the things Bernie is talking about are true. The system is rigged. Ben Cohen
In the end, this election is going to be about big money versus people power. Jerry Greenfield |
| So volunteer: knock on doors, make phone calls, talk to your friends. Ben Cohen
Wear your Bernie gear, put a bumper sticker on your car, and a sign on your lawn. But today, we have one more request. Jerry Greenfield |
| [**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign ahead of Thursday's important FEC fundraising deadline, the last one of the year.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28b5/43f17890/48bfd820/620dd417/1911046980/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151229am-bj-full") Ben Cohen
In our view, too many candidates running for office now-a-days are financed by corporate interests. Jerry Greenfield |
| If you're a corporation, it's the best investment you can make. The return is extraordinary. Ben Cohen
Too many politicians sell out cheap. Jerry Greenfield |
| But not Bernie. His campaign is funded by over TWO MILLION individual contributions, averaging less than $30 each. That's something we should all be very proud of. Ben Cohen
I made a few of those contributions. Jerry Greenfield |
| And we've also spent a couple hundred dollars purchasing ice cream for campaign events. Ben Cohen
But with one month to go until people start voting, we need to ask one more time for our friend Bernie. Jerry Greenfield |
| [**Make a $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign ahead of Thursday's important FEC fundraising deadline, the last one of the year.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb28b5/43f17890/48bfd820/620dd417/1911046980/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/your-movement?refcode=em151229am-bj-full") Ben Cohen
Every time Bernie ran for office in Vermont, people would say he didn't have a chance. Jerry Greenfield |
| But Bernie not only gets elected, he gets re-elected. Ben Cohen
And together, I know we're going to shock the political elite when we win in Iowa next month. Jerry Greenfield |

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Governor Rendell is exactly right when he says that Katie's December 31st deadline is her biggest one of the year.

**But here 's the best news yet: a group of anonymous donors has just this afternoon agreed to MATCH all gifts to Katie this week. This would be huge for us, but there's a catch - we can only unlock the match if we can get 100 grassroots donations before midnight tonight.**

This would be HUGE for Katie - it means DOUBLE the resources towards building a campaign strong enough to defeat Pat Toomey and turn Pennsylvania back to blue. But we've got to act fast: we only have until midnight tonight to unlock the match.

[**RIGHT NOW: Chip in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign to help unlock this donor match opportunity and hit our critical end-of-year goal.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/129103663196012544/-7929410678194962432?refcode=e20151229&refcode2=e20151229nd&amount=5)

Let's get this done,

Mike Mikus
Campaign Manager

\--- Forwarded Message ---

Dear Friend,

When I asked Katie McGinty to join my administration as Secretary of Environmental Protection, she didn't hesitate to answer the call. Katie had spent her entire career creating jobs, protecting our natural resources, and serving the public, and I knew that she was the right person for the job.

Now, Katie is answering the call to public service yet again - this time in response to the thousands of Pennsylvanians who want her to represent their families in the U.S. Senate.

I encouraged Katie to run because she's a problem solver who knows how to get things done. If we can get Katie to Washington, middle class Pennsylvanians will have a Senator who will not just fight for them, they'll have a Senator who will win those fights, ensuring that all of us have the best opportunities possible to pursue the American dream.

**Katie is facing her BIGGEST fundraising deadline of the year on December 31st, and she needs your help right now if she 's going to meet her goal of raising $10,000 in online, grassroots contributions.

[Can you pitch in to ensure she makes it? Make your grassroots contribution right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/129103663196012544/-7929410678194962432?refcode=e20151229&refcode2=e20151229nd&amount=5)**

There's no denying that times are hard. Families are working longer hours for lower pay, and they feel like no matter what they do, they can't seem to get ahead.

Katie will be exactly the Senator that we need advocating for us in Washington, putting our needs first and investing in good schools and good jobs once again. But Katie can't stand up for us in Washington unless we stand up with her right now, and that means making absolutely sure that she meets this critical end of year fundraising goal.

There's not much time left, and whether Katie goes into 2016 with the resources she needs to power this campaign is entirely dependent on what happens in the next 72 hours.

[**Katie needs to meet her $10,000 online goal before midnight on December 31st, and that means she needs you to make your contribution to her campaign right now. Contribute here >>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/129103663196012544/-7929410678194962432?refcode=e20151229&refcode2=e20151229nd&amount=5)

Thanks for answering the call,

Governor Ed Rendell
Chairman, Katie McGinty for Senate

subject: Update: It's make or break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

I know these emails tend to get a bit dramatic toward the end of the month, but honestly, they fit with the events of the past few weeks.

**_National Journal_ just ranked which Senate seats are most likely to flip parties in 2016, and Marco Rubio's Florida seat was fourth on the list.**

But we still have a lot of challenges standing in our way. For starters, there is a poll out there that says 46% of Florida voters remain undecided on who they're supporting for Senate. And, of course, a SuperPAC has already created a warped video that completely misrepresents my record.

[**It 's all proof that we can't let up -- even for a second. Can you help me build on this recent momentum by giving $5 or more?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21a6/738133e4/3b81ba57/7f839bb4/3331907297/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151229pm2?refcode=pme151229pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Unfortunately, no matter what we do, outside money isn't going to stop flowing into Florida if Karl Rove and the Kochs have anything to say about it. _We can 't change that._

**However, we can change minds. We can get our message across to Floridians.** They need to know that I'm prepared to fight for their health care, Medicare, civil liberties and economic prosperity. **I 'm prepared to win and put the Senate back in Democratic control.**

[**But I need the resources to do it. We only have 48 hours left before our deadline. Contribute $5 or more and put us on track to reach $40,000.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae21a6/738133e4/3b81ba57/7f839bb4/3331907297/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151229pm2?refcode=pme151229pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: Part Two: Politics at Best and Worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

It is a sign of our ongoing political dysfunction that the best that can be said about this past year in Congress is that we kept the government open and did no major harm.

I know it is small consolation, but given the Tea Party agenda -- blocking the President's Climate initiative; defunding the Affordable Care Act, closing down Planned Parenthood and women's health programs; and adding a religious test for refugees for the first time in our country's history -- it was better than the alternative. But, we both know it is not enough.

That's why 2015 will be remembered as a year when Congress failed to act on pressing issues of our time - like rampant gun violence, income inequality, and the scandal of mass incarceration.

I am sure, like me, you would like a House and Senate where -- rather than simply stopping bad things from happening, we actively make progress toward addressing these and other challenges facing our country and world.

**[Will you help us make 2016 a year when we elect a Senate and House that will take seriously the challenges we face at home and abroad? To win a Democratic Majority in the Senate, we must win the Senate here in Maryland, and we learned the hard way in 2014 that we cannot take a statewide victory for granted.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c0d/70cdc2ba/47ba06b2/39648e4/2012986146/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em122915_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+help+us+make+2016+a+year+when+w&utm_campaign=em122915_1&source=em122915_1")** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** **[Contribute $15 immediately before our FEC deadline](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c0d/70cdc2ba/47ba06b2/39648e5/2012986146/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em122915_1_15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+15+immediately+before+our+FEC&utm_campaign=em122915_1&source=em122915_1")** **[Contribute $35 immediately before our FEC deadline](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c0d/70cdc2ba/47ba06b2/39648e2/2012986146/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=em122915_1_35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Contribute+35+immediately+before+our+FEC&utm_campaign=em122915_1&source=em122915_1")** **[Contribute $50 immediately before our FEC deadline](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c0d/70cdc2ba/47ba06b2/39648e3/2012986146/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em122915_1_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Contribute+50+immediately+before+our+FEC&utm_campaign=em122915_1&source=em122915_1")** **[Contribute any amount to help before our FEC deadline>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c0d/70cdc2ba/47ba06b2/39648e0/2012986146/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em122915_1_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Contribute+any+amount+to+help+before+our&utm_campaign=em122915_1&source=em122915_1")** But to win the Senate seat in November, we must first win the Primary on April 26. And, at this very moment, an outside SuperPac is spending $1 million on Baltimore area media to stop us.

**[That is why I am asking for your help now. Please make a contribution before the end-of-year FEC deadline- it is the BEST way to send a strong message that Maryland will not allow outside SuperPacs to hijack our elections. ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c0d/70cdc2ba/47ba06b2/39648e1/2012986146/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-eoq-dec?refcode=em122915_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+help+no&utm_campaign=em122915_1&source=em122915_1")** The reality is that - until we succeed at changing our broken campaign finance system, the only way we can counter this outside money is with your help.

Many thanks and all the best,

Chris

clean_body: I need to know you have my back. | Friend -- Winning an election can come down to the smallest of margins -- like a handful of votes in an Iowa precinct or a few dozen calls made in a battleground state. That’s true of fundraising, too -- $1 donations really add up, and can make the difference when it comes time to reach and turn out voters in key states. Before midnight on Thursday, we need 22 people in your community to chip in $1 to get us to our end-of-year online fundraising goal.
